^(rawValue)$.description:
Binary-safe material content. For inline artifacts, contains the raw bytes.
 For string materials, contains the UTF-8 encoded value.
 For non-inline materials (container images, uploaded artifacts), contains
 the filename or image reference as UTF-8.
 Clients should prefer this field over the deprecated string value field.

^(uploadedToCas)$.description: it's been uploaded to an actual CAS backend

filename.description: filename of the artifact that was either uploaded or injected inline in "value"

raw_value.description:
Binary-safe material content. For inline artifacts, contains the raw bytes.
 For string materials, contains the UTF-8 encoded value.
 For non-inline materials (container images, uploaded artifacts), contains
 the filename or image reference as UTF-8.
 Clients should prefer this field over the deprecated string value field.

tag.description: in the case of a container image, the tag of the attested image

uploaded_to_cas.description: it's been uploaded to an actual CAS backend

value.description: Deprecated: use raw_value instead. This field cannot represent binary content.
